PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for (petitioner) Virginia Baker. John Kithas for (petitioner) Anna Farley.

The Court stated that this is a spousal property petition, that it is being objected to on the basis that the will was not properly admitted. Mr. Kato stated that they have resolved the issues. Mr. Kithas stated that they will submit the paperwork, that it will be a withdrawal, that the objections will be withdrawn contingent on the settlement agreement. The Court stated that if the objections are withdrawn the spousal property petition will probably be pre-granted. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to November 1, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Court expects the withdrawal of objections to be filed no later than 10/26/16.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
